steps.assistant_text: True bitfield-struct assignment burns the t9 ucode slot and orders the lb side first: ((B22398*)a1)->f=(signed char)a0[1]; with unsigned char hi:4,f:2,lo:2. Also discovered: IDO evaluates the RIGHT operand of | first (emits as or rs).
